text: The sterile brightness and transparency of the meeting room prompt a sensation of preparation and waiting. I feel as if I am on the threshold between anticipation and action. In the R+D exhibit, with its visual noise of bold letters and abstract backdrops, my attention is splintered between meanings. The digital displays and explanatory text make me reflect on the relentless drive for progress, the curiosity that propels development, and my own place—caught both as an observer and a participant in this dance of innovation. Amid all this, there is both excitement and a slight sense of unease: am I part of the evolution I witness, or do I merely document its passing?
